title: Sunday Bun Sliders
description: A delicious and easy-to-make burger slider perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon. Made with rich, chewy buns and savory fillings.

ingredients.name: bun
ingredients.notes: for the top and bottom of the slider

instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Cook the potato until tender, then mash or dice.
3. Grill the buns until lightly toasted.
4. Assemble the sliders by spreading mashed potato on the bottom bun, followed by your desired fillings.
